subcodes.first_line: O spark of the fire of the love of God! In this hour when the coldness of heart hath encompassed the people of the nether realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قبسه نار محبت الله در این وقت که برودت قلب دل اهل افق ادنی را احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
